The '''''Nemphas''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]] that shot down the ''[[Spirit of Jabba]]'' near [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*"[[The Jabba Tape]]" {{1st}}
